title: [Cobblemon] Presi's Mega Emporium
body:
**IMPORTANT: In order to work, you need to copy the pack to BOTH your datapack and resource pack folder.**


An addon for Cobblemon that adds megas for some relatively overlooked Pokemon that I particularly like.



<details>
<summary>Mega Porygon-Z</summary>


![The true Z Mega in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eed2c78d59d9470ad1f8e23e901c6a4bb2bfc143.png)

**TYPE:** NORMAL

**BASE STATS:**

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1f29b970ccaa1bb7d5f2f4f1391fb34723a3a6b.png)

**ABILITY:**
>  _**Point Blank:** Powers up beam moves_ (the list of beam-type moves can be found in the changelog)

# **Porygonzite recipe**
![Porygonzite recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8d2fc4ba5741e222119f863b35aaedb42be74f0.png)
</details>



<details>
<summary>Mega Swalot</summary>

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9983b5dd215bfab8d1e28cbb6cc27139fb809f0.png)


**TYPE:** POISON/ICE

**BASE STATS:**

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d7e078ce50e412cccd472343938154c2c5bb7ee.png)

**ABILITY:**
>  _**Gourmand:** The user receives an omniboost when defeating opposing Pokémon._

# **Swalotite recipe**

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b0d5937aff09e9e61d0c1184ef77e55adf4fadf.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mega Dracovish</summary>


![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91ba6c27a0cdfade81f3237d7d057befd2ba1a3e.png)

The little head's design was based on [this artwork by Scept](https://x.com/PkScept/status/1858140533484650777/photo/1)

**TYPE:** WATER/DRAGON

**BASE STATS:**

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e28203a225fa5297b603648190312ee56ad4b8e5.png)

**ABILITY:**
>  _**Sheer Force**_

# **Dracovishite recipe**
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/413f5ef8a3308a6e37ee7a97f99d84960b2e2eaf.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Mega Tyrantrum</summary>

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28eb71dbe266ac7edc7892bf817721d0615b6bf6.png)

**TYPE:** ROCK/DRAGON

**BASE STATS:**

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/897c636b844f58961b08e68abe7331843002f48f.png)

**ABILITY:**
>  _**Intimidate**_

# **Tyrantrumite recipe**
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/737576501bb26a08d1e5172dc61a068cb828e4f9.png)
</details>
